name: Blake Taylor
positioning: AI Product Builder · Technical Founder · Operator
summary: Founder of Koinophobia Labs, a one-person AI product studio in Chicago. Ships end to end: native iOS and Next.js web products, LLM-backed features, and automation systems — designed, built, tested, deployed, and verified in production. Background in high-tempo sports and gaming operations, with an operator's eye for where real systems break.
openTo: Open to conversations around product, AI tools, operations, support, startups, and technical customer-facing work.

experience.title: Founder
bullets: Built and shipped Trendi, a native SwiftUI iOS creator app with an LLM-backed coaching pipeline, distributed through TestFlight.
Built and launched live web products: You Know Ball (sports-debate MVP) and Career Forge (local-first career and résumé tool).

Designed and runs the studio's production platform on Next.js: CRM, website-audit, intake, and proposal systems behind authenticated server APIs, with database migrations wired into the deploy pipeline.
Operates a productized website revenue-leak audit offer for local businesses, from crawling and scoring through client-ready reporting.
Owns the full product lifecycle solo: architecture, implementation, adversarial QA, deployment (Vercel, App Store Connect), production verification, and documentation.

background: Before founding Koinophobia Labs: sports and gaming operations — high-tempo, high-pressure, customer-facing environments including sportsbook operations, plus community, content, and product work. That operating experience is the foundation of the studio's approach: build from real problems, and test where systems actually break.

projects.name: Trendi
projects.blurb: Creator consistency app that turns a rough thought into clear words to say on camera. Native SwiftUI iOS product with a two-pipeline LLM coaching architecture.

projects.name: Career Forge
projects.blurb: Local-first command center for positioning, résumés, applications, outreach, and interview prep. Live web tool; nothing uploaded, everything on-device.

projects.name: You Know Ball
projects.blurb: Sports-debate game where users defend takes and get judged. Live web MVP and product-proof asset.

projects.name: Koinophobia Labs platform
projects.blurb: The studio's production site and business system: Next.js server app with CRM, audits, intake, and proposal generation running live.

skills.label: Product & AI
items: LLM integration and agent workflow design
